Why Wagon Windows

Built on Reliability

We show up on time, do the job right, and leave your windows looking better than you've seen them.

100%

Streak-Free Results

We don't leave until every pane is spotless. If you're not happy, we come back.

Local

Shuswap Owned

We live and work here. We know the Shuswap climate and what your windows deal with every season.

Fast

Easy Booking

Get an instant estimate online in under 2 minutes, or reach us by phone or text. We respond fast.

Safe

Insured & Professional

Fully insured. We treat your home with care — no shortcuts, no damage, no stress.

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

No surprises, no hidden fees. Most window cleaners won't show you a number — we will.

Up to 15 windows
from $169
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $229

Where We Work

Serving the Shuswap Region

Wagon Windows is based in Salmon Arm and proudly serves the surrounding Shuswap communities.
